payload.note: The individual undergoing onboarding, Tareck Joseph, matches an entity listed in the SDN program, Tareck El Aissami. However, there are discrepancies: a mismatch in date of birth (1974-11-12 vs. 1990-05-11) and geography (US vs. Venezuela). The deterministic decision label is 'investigate_next_step' due to these contradictions needing analyst confirmation before closure.
evidence_summary: Name overlap between screened and matched party but without matching date of birth, geography, or identifiers.
Geographical mismatch between screened US resident and matched Venezuelan entity.
missing_information_summary: Additional corroboration required for date of birth and geographic details
Matched party has a different date of birth than the screened party
